elianor-veyr.bubble_placement_rule: place Elianor-owned bubbles near her face, hand, eye reflection, or posture so the reader knows the thought belongs to her
elianor-veyr.bubble_style: normal spoken lines use elegant ivory speech bubbles with thin black ink outline and refined serif text
elianor-veyr.canon_prompt: Early twenties, tall slender fallen princess, moon-pale skin, long black hair with blue-black sheen, ash-gray eyes that turn silver during eclipse magic, sharp delicate features, torn white execution dress with faded silver embroidery, bruised wrists, restrained sorrowful expression, never sexualized.
elianor-veyr.name: Elianor Veyr

pose_bank.description: Neutral full-body standing pose for scale and costume continuity.
Close-up face angle preserving eyes, nose, lips, hairline, and expression style.
pose_bank.use_when: dialogue, shock, internal thought, emotional beats

pose_bank.description: Hands interacting with chains, weapon, relic, document, or clothing without anatomy drift.
Lying on prison floor, full body visible from hair to feet, torn white dress, chains, bruised wrists and legs, non-sexual tragic framing.
pose_bank.use_when: chapter 1 panels 1-3 and continuity from panel 1 into panel 2

pose_bank.description: Pushing herself upright despite chains, shoulders straight, injured but dignified.

reference_images.purpose: Lock full body proportions, outfit, hair length, main silhouette, and costume details.
reference_images.prompt_addendum: Full-body front view, neutral readable pose, clean silhouette, complete costume visible from head to feet, no text.

reference_images.purpose: Lock face, body volume, hairstyle, and costume in premium manhwa perspective.
reference_images.prompt_addendum: Three-quarter full-body view, cinematic but clear, same costume and face, no text.

reference_images.purpose: Lock facial features and emotional range for close-ups.
reference_images.prompt_addendum: Expression sheet with neutral, fear, anger, resolve, shock, and quiet sorrow; same face in every expression, no text labels.

reference_images.purpose: Lock important hands, scars, jewelry, relics, cuffs, weapons, or role-specific objects.
reference_images.prompt_addendum: Detail sheet for hands and role-specific props, consistent anatomy and materials, no text labels.

reference_images.purpose: Lock the most important chapter-one pose for continuity in rendered panels.
reference_images.prompt_addendum: Elianor lying on cold prison stone in torn white execution dress, full body visible including legs and feet, bruised wrists, chains, hair spread like ink, never sexualized, no text.

elianor-veyr.thought_style: internal thoughts may use black-silver bordered ivory bubbles with soft moonlight, placed close to her face or eye

eclipse-crown.bubble_placement_rule: make the thought dots or glow point to the Crown's magical source, not randomly into empty space
eclipse-crown.bubble_style: never use normal speech tails; use supernatural thought bubbles
eclipse-crown.canon_prompt: Living black-silver crown of thornlike lunar metal, visible only in reflections, shadows, blood, polished blades, or near Elianor's brow during eclipse magic.
eclipse-crown.name: Eclipse Crown

pose_bank.description: Crown appears only as black-silver thorn reflection inside Elianor eye.
pose_bank.use_when: inner voice and magical identity reveal

pose_bank.description: Crown visible in shadow or blade reflection, not physically sitting on head.

eclipse-crown.thought_style: warm ivory circular or oval thought bubble with thin black-silver ring, subtle moon glow, and a dotted chain toward Elianor's forehead, eye reflection, blood, shadow, or crown glint

caelan-rhovir.bubble_placement_rule: place Caelan bubbles near his face, gloved hand, heart scar, or kneeling position
caelan-rhovir.bubble_style: firm ivory speech bubbles with crisp ink border and restrained cold-blue accent if useful

caelan-rhovir.name: Caelan Rhovir
